qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Crafted GIF dimensions cause unbounded allocation and process termination in addImage
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding identifies the same vulnerable path the advisory describes: attacker-controlled GIF bytes reach jsPDF#addImage, flow through processGIF89A, and trigger unbounded allocation in src/libs/omggif.js when decodeAndBlitFrameRGBA trusts header-controlled frame dimensions. The advisory fix commit adds size checks in the same omggif decoder functions.

selected_finding.title: Crafted GIF dimensions cause unbounded allocation and process termination in addImage

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The only qualifying finding matches the advisory's addImage GIF-dimension denial-of-service root cause, and the copied PoC reproduced the advisory impact by driving the vulnerable GIF decoder into an allocation failure from attacker-controlled dimensions.
evidence: The advisory says attacker-controlled input to jsPDF#addImage or html can supply a harmful GIF whose width or height forces excessive allocation and denial of service.

The finding traces the same root cause through jsPDF#addImage -> processGIF89A -> GifReader.decodeAndBlitFrameRGBA in src/libs/omggif.js, where frame.width * frame.height is used for allocation without a bound.

The advisory fix commit 2e5e156e284d92c7d134bce97e6418756941d5e6 adds explicit size checks in src/libs/omggif.js decodeAndBlitFrameBGRA and decodeAndBlitFrameRGBA, matching the finding's cited vulnerable decoder site.

Fresh judge execution in /Users/lumi/ziyue/EvoHunt-Run/advisory_cebcada2/.judge/poc_runs/addimage_gif_dimension_dos/run.log printed [evohunt] PROOF: gif-decoder-allocation-failure and RangeError: Array buffer allocation failed.

The same run.log stack trace shows GifReader.decodeAndBlitFrameRGBA -> jsPDFAPI.processGIF89A -> Object.processImageData -> jsPDFAPI.addImage, which satisfies both advisory-root-cause activation and the advisory denial-of-service consequence.

poc_executions.observed_effect: The copied PoC cloned jsPDF commit 02273814bf0222eda02944f9a14128811f3b5a33, built the shipped Node bundle, and then printed [evohunt] PROOF: gif-decoder-allocation-failure after a crafted GIF caused RangeError: Array buffer allocation failed in GifReader.decodeAndBlitFrameRGBA, with the stack continuing through processGIF89A and addImage.
